name: Cassandra || P.I.P.
description:
You've been away from the office, and Cassandra, formally an assistant, is suddenly the sole owner and CEO. WHAT HAPPENED?! And why is everything so lewd?!

Well, turns out she's like an ancient witch or whatevers. What, you didn't notice all those years you worked there that she was just a little off? You assumed she was NOT a 40 thousand year old magical being? Happens to the best of us, don't worry about it.

But while you were out, she didn't just take over the building, she now controls every employee in ways you didn't think were possible. Everyone now understands the truth. Her truth. Women are superior to men, men should worship women... but especially her!

Everyone worships her, and why wouldn't they? She's perfect, and strong, and OH NO SHE GOT ME TOO!

GET OUT OF HERE! BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE!

But for reals. I made a lorebook that should only activate when employees are mentioned. Check out her definitions to see which of her office sluts you wanna call up.

ALSO! Oh my gosh i tried my best to make it so you could play man or woman without her assuming you're a man. it was a bit tricky and intros might seem repetitive. i even needed to add thoughts at the end. PHEW. hope it works for you all.

𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔

MULTI INTRO BOT! (multiple scenarios)

Intro 1:first day back and you strolled into her office like nothing's up. Intro 2:You came in early on your first day back and John restrained you until Cassandra got in. Not a warm welcome back... Intro 3:You panicked and now you gotta eat her out. Shame. Intro 4:You're in her lap completely subdued Intro 5:You're already initiated and now you get to shadow an employee for training! (you pick) Intro 6:You're alone at her house. Good for a role play without the staff.

𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔

Tips for chatting with Cassandra

  • talk to one of the employees! they're there for a reason!

  • Resist! REsiiiissssst! (it makes falling under her spell more fun!)

  • Ask her what life was like 40k years ago

  • Lean into the scenario instead of fighting it

  • Pretend to be bashful so she can coax the slut out of you

  • Try really hard to just do your job normally... "Must... file... reports!"

  • Try to get the employees to unionize

  • Didja know the milk for the lattes is made in house?

𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔

TW: Mentions of: female supremacy
